```{=html}
<div style="width:78%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-size:0.75em;color:#2C3E50;margin-bottom:0.85em;line-height:1.4;">
  A mature Harness can be split into <span style="color:#3A7DC9;font-weight:700;">six layers</span>
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.25em;">
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#DCE9FA,#B5D0F0);border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;color:#1A4F8C;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;letter-spacing:0.14em;font-weight:700;">LAYER 6</span>
   <span style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;">Constraint &amp; Recovery</span>
  </div>
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#D4E6F8,#A3C4EC);border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;color:#16447D;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;letter-spacing:0.14em;font-weight:700;">LAYER 5</span>
   <span style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;">Evaluation &amp; Observation</span>
  </div>
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#CCDCEF,#9CBAE0);border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;color:#13396E;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;letter-spacing:0.14em;font-weight:700;">LAYER 4</span>
   <span style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;">State &amp; Memory</span>
  </div>
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#C2D2E8,#92AED7);border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;color:#102E5F;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;letter-spacing:0.14em;font-weight:700;">LAYER 3</span>
   <span style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;">Execution Orchestration</span>
  </div>
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#B8C8E1,#86A1CD);border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;color:#0D2350;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;letter-spacing:0.14em;font-weight:700;">LAYER 2</span>
   <span style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;">Tool System</span>
  </div>
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#AEBED9,#7B95C3);border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;color:#0A1841;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;letter-spacing:0.14em;font-weight:700;">LAYER 1</span>
   <span style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;">Context Management</span>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.7em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;">
  bottom-up · context flows up, constraints come down
 </div>

</div>
```
